article_meta.title: Kayla Bartkowski / GettyMarjorie Taylor Greene Came So Close to Getting the JokeWhat the Georgia representative learned

reasoning: The model returned an empty array despite multiple clear instances of author-level bias in headlines and blurbs (e.g., loaded/pejorative titles and subjective assertions). No attribution violations occurred, but major false negatives dominate.
